description: Register a DeltaLakePandasIOManager so assets are stored as Delta tables on local disk, S3, GCS, or Azure ADLS

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Dagster resource key for this IO manager. Use 'io_manager' to make it the default.

root_uri.label: Root URI
root_uri.description: Root path for Delta tables, e.g. '/data/delta', 's3://bucket/delta', 'az://container/delta'

aws_access_key_env_var.label: AWS Access Key Env Var
aws_access_key_env_var.description: Environment variable for AWS access key (S3 storage)

aws_secret_key_env_var.label: AWS Secret Key Env Var
aws_secret_key_env_var.description: Environment variable for AWS secret key (S3 storage)

aws_region.label: AWS Region
aws_region.description: AWS region for S3 storage, e.g. 'us-east-1'

azure_storage_account_env_var.label: Azure Storage Account Env Var
azure_storage_account_env_var.description: Environment variable for Azure storage account name

azure_storage_key_env_var.label: Azure Storage Key Env Var
azure_storage_key_env_var.description: Environment variable for Azure storage account key

gcp_credentials_env_var.label: GCP Credentials Env Var
gcp_credentials_env_var.description: Environment variable holding a GCS service account JSON key
